No — I'm not currently connected to any Google Sheet. I don't have Google Sheets API credentials configured, and I haven't done any Sheet updates during this session.

I can see from `china-coffee-sheet-copy-paste.md` that a sheet was planned around Jul 7 with buyer tracking and email sequence tabs. If you shared a sheet link in a previous session, I don't have that context in memory right now.

**Can you drop me the sheet URL?** I'll take a look at what's there and what's needed. If you need me...

## Connecting Me to Google Sheets

**What I need:**
- A Google Cloud service account + JSON key
- The sheet shared with that service account email

**What you'd do:**
1. Go to [console.cloud.google.com](https://console.cloud.google.com) → IAM → Service Accounts → create one
2. Generate a JSON key → paste it into a file I can access
3. Share your Sheet with the service account email (looks like `your-service@project.iam.gserviceaccount.com`)
...
